The classification of Morisonia salicifolia includes the kingdom Plantae, and the order Brassicales. The plant is also known as the 'Willow-leaf Capparid' due to its characteristic leaves. Morisonia salicifolia is a unique addition to the Capparaceae family with its distinct features.
